gadgets.title: Money Clock
gadgets.description: Watch your earnings tick up in real time. Enter your salary, hit start, and see exactly how much you make every second. Time is literally money.

gadgets.title: Wellness & Supplement Recommender
gadgets.description: A 5-minute assessment that gives you personalised, evidence-graded supplement suggestions — ranked by relevance to your body and goals.

resources.title: Develop Your Career Like an MBB Consultant
resources.description: A practical checklist for building the professional skills that matter most in your first 1–2 years — with tangible examples of what 'good' looks like.

resources.title: The Language of Impact
resources.description: The exact speech patterns, reframes, and language habits that build credibility and influence — with before/after examples for every situation.

books.title: How to Win Friends and Influence People
books.description: The foundational playbook on human connection — distilled into the lessons that actually stick, with concrete ways to practise each one.

books.title: The Power of Now
books.description: A guide to escaping the prison of compulsive thinking — the ideas that actually changed how I experience day-to-day life.
